name: Papa's Donuteria
author: Poki
description: You just got a new job at Papa's Donuteria in the whimsical town of Powder Point! The pay and benefits are nice, but you took the job for that coveted Line-Jump Pass for the amusement park right outside the shop. It's not all fun and games though: Now you also have to cook delicious donuts every day for all of the crazy customers in this carnival-like town. Happy customers will increase your score and tip you more money, which you can spend on decorating your restaurant. Can you make the Donuteria a success? How to play Papa's Donuteria? Use the mouse or tap to navigate your way trough the kitchen and make the most delicious donuts! Who created Papa's Donuteria? Papa's Donuteria is created by Flipline Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Papa's Sushiria , Papa's Freezeria , Papa's Pizzeria and Jacksmith How can I play Papa's Donuteria for free? You can play Papa's Donuteria for free on Poki. Can I play Papa's Donuteria on mobile devices and desktop? Papa's Donuteria can be played on your computer and mobile devices
